notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Gift flow and post add-on preservation remain unchanged from CC7.5.14.
After saving a button, the final screen now shows the full current state of the post: all button names, button count, and gift summary.
Button management menu is now single-column: add, edit button 1, delete button 1, edit button 2, delete button 2, etc. This should avoid the split-screen cramped layout.
Text summary no longer uses unclear abbreviations; it says 'Кнопки сейчас' and 'Куда ведёт'.
Post patcher remains DB-V3-POST-PATCHER-1.2-MULTI-ADDONS-PRESERVE and keeps comments + buttons + gift rows together.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: still layered through 7510-7515 wrappers. After acceptance, merge admin flows into one clean core module.
